name: Reflected Wound
flavor: You show it a version of itself already broken, and for one sick instant its own body believes the lie.
description: You conjure a flickering reflection of a creature you can see within range, twisted into a vision of its own mortal wound. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. On a failure, it takes [[1d8+Con]] psychic damage as its mind flinches from damage that was never real. On a success, it takes half as much damage.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft, cooldown 2. Wis save vs trick DC. Fail: [[1d8+Con]] psychic. Success: half damage.
